projects.name: Orion Search
projects.description: Vector + keyword hybrid search service for internal docs.

projects.name: Nova Onboarding
projects.description: Guided onboarding flows for new tenants.

notes.author: amelia
notes.text: Reranking with a cross-encoder lifted precision but doubled p95 latency.

notes.author: diego
notes.text: Chunk size of 512 tokens with 64 overlap gave the best recall in eval.

notes.author: rahul
notes.text: Proration edge cases on mid-cycle plan upgrades need a dedicated test suite.

notes.author: sofia
notes.text: Onboarding paused pending the new design system rollout.

documents.title: Orion Search Architecture
documents.content: Hybrid retrieval combines BM25 with dense vectors, fused via reciprocal rank fusion before an optional cross-encoder rerank.

documents.title: Billing Data Model
documents.content: Invoices reference line items; usage events aggregate hourly into metered quantities keyed by subscription.

documents.title: Search Eval Playbook
documents.content: Golden query set of 200 labelled pairs; report recall@10 and MRR per retrieval variant.
